author: doll-agent
content: Verified done. masked_array.rs:316-341 already has the O(1) direct-indexing fast path: 'if let Some(slice) = mask.as_slice_mut() { slice[flat_idx] = value; }' (line 332). The iter_mut().nth(flat_idx) only runs in the rare case where the mask is non-contiguous. For typical contiguous masks (which is everything constructed via the public API), set_mask_flat is O(1). Two tests (set_mask_flat_false_on_nomask_stays_zero_allocation, set_mask_flat_true_on_nomask_materializes_and_promotes) cover the path. Issue was filed against an older revision; the current code is fine.
